creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Ben Woods from comment #4)

B. Woods: I can confirm the following: I was able prior to this mess to produce quality printing output using "HP Officejet Pro 8600 hpijs, 3.14.4". Now I have to use "HP Officejet Pro 8600, hpcups 3.16.10". Selecting the proper printer via manual load of PPD via webinterface or by command line delegating to the correct ppd file doesn't work anymore, because the Office Jet Pro 8600_n911a ppd isn't available in the hplip port on FreeBSD.

Selecting the driver in the selection box produces crap on photo printouts - this is unprofessional crap!

hpjis and hplip are mutual exclusive ports. How am I considered to solve a problem on a cups server with both worlds of printers, PS/PDF and PCL?
